title: Nuit Interop (formerly FabricSkyBoxes Interop)
description: Nuit Interoperability for OptiFine/MCPatcher and legacy FabricSkyBoxes sky formats
body:
# Nuit Interop  
_Formerly known as **FabricSkyBoxes Interop**_

**Nuit Interop** provides compatibility for **OptiFine/MCPatcher custom skies**, allowing them to work seamlessly with [Nuit](https://modrinth.com/mod/nuit) — the modern, multiloader successor to FabricSkyBoxes.

This mod enables out-of-the-box support for existing OptiFine resource packs and will soon also offer **backward compatibility with legacy FabricSkyBoxes packs**.

---

## ✨ Features

- 🔁 **OptiFine/MCPatcher Conversion**  
  Automatically translates custom skies from OptiFine or MCPatcher resource packs to Nuit’s format at runtime.

- 🧠 **Smart Fallback**  
  Will not convert if a native Nuit/FabricSkyBoxes-format skybox is detected in the resource pack.

- ⚙️ **Flexible Control**  
  Lets users disable loading native Nuit-format skyboxes in favor of converted ones, for testing or override purposes.

- 🏛️ **Legacy FSB Support (Upcoming)**  
  Planned support for loading **FabricSkyBoxes**-formatted packs, helping users migrate gradually.

---

📘 Learn more about the core mod here:  
🔗 [Nuit on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/nuit)

##### ⚠️ Disclaimer  
Conversions are **best-effort** and may not be pixel-perfect due to fundamental differences between how OptiFine and Nuit handle sky rendering.

---
